title: RAG MicroSim
description: An interactive p5.js simulator that runs the three RAG steps - retrieval, augmentation, and generation - on a mini document corpus you can query.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Experiment with the RAG process by entering queries, observing retrieved documents and relevance scores, and seeing how the augmented prompt affects generation.
